author: Katharine Saunders
content: I highly recommend Ashley. He came out to check the electrics at my house to issue a certificate of compliance. He was knowledgeable, honest and fairly priced. As I couldn't be present at the visit he sent me a clear video demonstrating why the fuse box had failed the test and advised about the repair. Then, when we had agreed the new part that he needed to buy to make good, he also sent me a photo of the receipt of purchase as it turned out a little more expensive. He gave me good advice for the future and even called the energy supplier to alert them to some possible corrosion at the incoming point to my home which he had noticed. He didn't need to do this as it was my responsibility. Just great service! Thanks Ashley.
